title: daucus mirabilis
intro: Daucus mirabilis, also known as wild carrot, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Daucus mirabilis include its potential to alleviate colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Daucus mirabilis may be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
